Frequently Asked Questions

Do I have full ownership and rights?

Yes, all KevinLand owners may use their NFT however they wish, you own FULL rights to their NFT.

When do KevinLands reveal?

KevinLands will be revealed after minting is over!

Will KevinLands be listed on a rarity tools provider?

Yes, the team will work on attempting to get KevinLands listed on rarity sites as soon as minting is over.

What is the mint price?

Mint price will be 0.03 per Kevin with 5 maximum per transaction. There will be a total of 10k KevinLands, generated from dozens of different traits.

The name and Intellectual Property involved in the KevinLand Universe is owned by our team. All rights that are not specifically granted to the users and owners of KevinLands below are reserved by the team or potential future DAO. This includes but is not limited to the intellectual property rights surrounding the "KevinLand” names, logos, trademarks, the website, the look and feel of the user interface, the smart contract code, or anything else not specifically granted by any following licenses.
